_comment: Five-episode voiceover for timed demo video. Regenerate: python3 scripts/gradium_tts.py | One episode: python3 scripts/gradium_tts.py --beat ep01_intro_stage1

beats.title: What GreenLight is + Stage 1 — commercial upside
beats.text: GreenLight is an enterprise agent that decides whether a fashion line can launch. It weighs commercial upside against compliance risk under E.U. Directive twenty twenty-four eight twenty-five. For Élan Studio A W twenty-six, Kimi opens with a five-stage plan. Stage one: size the commercial upside. It pulls real Google Trends demand, cited market context, and DataCo margin benchmarks. The goal is simple — know what this line is worth before anyone checks a single claim.

beats.title: Stage 2 — adjudicate six marketing claims
beats.text: Stage two: adjudicate all six marketing claims. For each claim, Kimi retrieves the governing regulation from Vultr Turnkey R A G. When evidence is missing, it goes back — a second retrieval for supplier certificates. On the recycled polyester claim, the scope certificate is valid — but the transaction certificate covers only forty percent, not seventy. GreenLight blocks it, citing the exact E.C.G.T. article. A generic eco-friendly tag is blocked too — Annex one, point four a. Named schemes without a certificate on file are flagged needs-evidence, not rubber-stamped.

beats.title: Stage 3 — discover claim opportunities
beats.text: Stage three: discover claim opportunities the brand is not yet making. Kimi scans rising ethical demand — cruelty-free fashion is up — and matches it to materials already in the line. R.D.S.-certified down on the puffer. R.W.S. merino wool on the sweater. Same rigor as before: regulation check, supplier certificate, verdict. Both pass — add to launch, with projected demand uplift.

beats.title: Stage 4 — quantify risk exposure
beats.text: Stage four: quantify fine exposure. On a two-billion-euro turnover brand, widespread infringement caps at four percent — up to eighty million euros. GreenLight computes that ceiling from the blocked claims.

beats.title: Stage 5 — file launch determination
beats.text: Stage five: file the launch determination. Green-light with conditions — blocked claims dropped, honest additions recommended, every verdict traced to a document.
